description: Triangle collider is a component that acts as a single polygon version of a Mesh Collider

fields.Offset: how much to add to points ``A``, ``B``, and ``C``.
fields.A: The position of the first vertex of the triangle.
fields.B: The position of the second vertex of the triangle.
fields.C: The position of the third vertex of the triangle.

methods.ReverseWinding: Reverses the order of the vertex values so the face direction is flipped.
